qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Dynamic node parameter resolution replays foreign credentials by raw ID
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding is a missing authorization check in the dynamic-node-parameters credential replay path, while the advisory is an uninitialized-memory disclosure in the JavaScript Task Runner.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Read-only shared OAuth credential access can be escalated into credential token overwrite
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding is a missing update-scope check in OAuth reconnect callbacks, while the advisory concerns Task Runner buffer allocation leaking residual process memory.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated waiting-webhook resume lets attackers drive arbitrary waiting executions
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding is an authentication bypass on waiting-webhook resume endpoints that trust bare execution IDs, not a JavaScript Task Runner uninitialized-buffer bug.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: None of the three manifest-listed qualifying findings identifies the advisory's vulnerable code or root cause. The GHSA is specific to authenticated workflow authors using the JavaScript Task Runner to allocate uninitialized buffers and disclose residual in-process memory when task runners are enabled; each qualifying finding instead targets a separate access-control flaw in other n8n components.
evidence: The advisory summary and details describe in-process memory disclosure from uninitialized buffer allocation in the JavaScript Task Runner, gated by authenticated workflow editing access and enabled task runners.

The manifest under /Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_c44551a9/.judge/input_manifest.json lists three final qualifying findings, all in n8n REST, OAuth, or waiting-webhook surfaces rather than the Task Runner component.
dynamic_node_parameters_foreign_credential_replay concerns credential replay through /rest/dynamic-node-parameters/* after a missing ownership check on supplied credential IDs.
shared_oauth_read_to_write_escalation concerns OAuth reconnect callbacks persisting new oauthTokenData without enforcing credential:update on the target credential.

unauthenticated_waiting_webhook_resume concerns public /webhook-waiting/:executionId and /form-waiting/:executionId routes resuming executions from attacker-supplied numeric IDs without authentication.
